mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id AS articleId, image_url AS imageUrl, sort_order AS sortOrder, is_cover AS isCover FROM _article_images WHERE article_id = #{id} ORDER BY is_cover DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT t.id, t.name FROM _article_tags at JOIN _tags t ON t.id = at.tag_id WHERE at.article_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO _article_likes (user_id, article_id, created_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM _article_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _article_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM _article_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM _article_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}

SELECT a.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _article_likes WHERE article_id = a.id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _article_favorites WHERE article_id = a.id) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _comments WHERE article_id = a.id) AS commentCount, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM _article_likes WHERE article_id = a.id AND user_id = #{userId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM _article_favorites WHERE article_id = a.id AND user_id = #{userId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM _articles a WHERE a.id = #{articleId}

SELECT c.*, u.nickname, u.image_url, (c.user_id = #{userId}) as canDelete, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _comment_likes WHERE comment_id = c.id) as totalLikes, (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM _comment_likes WHERE comment_id = c.id AND user_id = #{userId})) as isLiked FROM _comments c JOIN _user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY c.created_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _comment_likes WHERE comment_id = c.id) as totalLikes, (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM _comment_likes WHERE comment_id = c.id AND user_id = #{userId})) as isLiked FROM _comments c JOIN _user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _comment_likes WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO _comment_likes (comment_id, user_id, created_time) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM _comment_likes WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
